AxTable.Name: RSMItemSubstitution

Method.Name: findActive
activeSubstitutesFor
validateWrite

AxTable.Label: Item substitutions
AxTable.DeveloperDocumentation: RSM Sales Proration — allowed item substitutions (whitelist, ratio, direction, optional customer scope).

AxTableField.Name: FromItemId
AxTableField.Label: Original item
AxTableField.HelpText: The item that is short and may be substituted.

AxTableField.Name: ToItemId
AxTableField.Label: Substitute item
AxTableField.HelpText: The item that may be offered in place of the original.

AxTableField.Name: CustAccount
AxTableField.Label: Customer
AxTableField.HelpText: Blank = rule applies to all customers. Set to scope the substitution to one customer's spec.
